title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Salarpuria Sattva - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
